label: Tillverkning av elapparatur
description: Scaffold för företag som tillverkar elapparatur och behöver presentera produktområden, tillverkningskapacitet, kvalitet/förtroende och en tydlig väg till kontakt för offert eller teknisk dialog.
primaryJobs: bygga fortroende kring tillverkningskapacitet och kvalitet
gora det enkelt att ta kontakt for offert eller teknisk forfragan

routes.purpose: Positionera tillverkaren, sammanfatta produktomraden och leda vidare till kontakt eller produktoversikt.
Visa produktkategorier, tillampningar och centrala egenskaper sa att besokaren snabbt forstar erbjudandet.
Beskriva tillverkningskapacitet, arbetssatt och kvalitet for att bygga fortroende hos inkopare och partners.
Bygga fortroende genom foretagsbeskrivning, team och relevanta uppgifter om verksamheten.
Gora det enkelt att skicka forfragan eller ta direktkontakt via telefon, e-post och adress.

routes.when: nar foretaget har kundcase, leveransprojekt eller omnamnanden som kan visas utan att röja konfidentiell information
nar saljprocessen ofta innefattar aterkommande fragor om specifikationer, leverans, produktion eller support

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what the company manufactures and include a primary contact CTA.
Product summary must highlight concrete product areas or apparatus types, not vague claims.
Capabilities summary should focus on manufacturing, customization, assembly, testing or delivery capabilities when such data exists.
Trust proof must appear before the final contact CTA and may include references, organizational details or quality-related process descriptions that are actually provided.
Sections must avoid repeating the same claims across product summary and capabilities summary.
Products intro must connect the manufacturer's offer to buyer needs or use cases.
Product category list items must be concrete categories, component groups or apparatus families.
Applications should explain where or how the products are used without inventing performance data.
A contact CTA should invite technical questions, quote requests or dialogue about requirements.
Manufacturing intro must explain the company's production role clearly, such as own manufacturing, assembly or customization.
Process overview should describe real steps such as design support, production, assembly, testing or logistics when provided.
Capabilities detail must stay specific and avoid unsupported claims about capacity, tolerances or certifications.
Quality and delivery may mention documented routines, testing, traceability or lead-time dialogue only when such information exists.
The page should emphasize operational trust, not generic brand storytelling.
About story must be specific to the business, its history, focus or customer relationships.
Team should only appear when real people or roles are available.
Company facts should prioritize factual details such as organization number, location and business focus.
Trust proof must not invent certifications, customer counts or years of experience.
Phone, email and address must all be present and not be placeholders.
Contact form should be suitable for quote requests or technical inquiries.
Map should be shown when a visitable address exists.
Opening hours should only be shown when actual hours are available.

mustPass: Includes a home route and a contact route.
Page set is adapted to manufacturing of electrical apparatus with dedicated products and manufacturing pages.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
Contact path is Swedish, lowercase and starts with '/'.
Recommended dossiers only use allowed dossier ids.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic local-service structure that lacks product or manufacturing information.
Invented certifications, standards compliance, production volumes or customer logos.
Vague service copy that does not explain what is manufactured.
Repeating the same trust claims on every page.
Using pricing tables for products that are typically quote-based or specification-dependent without real pricing data.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Tillverkning av elapparatur, industriell tillverkare, elektriska produkter, produktkategorier, tillverkningskapacitet, montering, testning, kvalitet, leverans, teknisk forfragan, offert, kontakt.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold when the business manufactures electrical apparatus or closely related electrical product lines.
Prefer this over a generic service-business scaffold when products and production capability are central to the buying decision.
The site should support B2B trust-building through product overview, manufacturing information and direct inquiry contact.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
